message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam classFontStyle italic
skinparam classBackgroundColor #F5F5F5
skinparam classBorderColor #CCCCCC
skinparam classHeaderBackgroundColor #E8E8E8
skinparam classHeaderFontColor #333333
skinparam classHeaderFontSize 14
skinparam classHeaderFontStyle bold
skinparam classAttributeFontColor #333333
skinparam classAttributeFontSize 12
skinparam classMethodFontColor #333333
skinparam classMethodFontSize 12
skinparam classMethodFontStyle normal
skinparam classMethodIconSize 0
skinparam classMethodIconColor #4CAF50
skinparam classMethodIconBackgroundColor #4CAF50
skinparam classMethodIconBorderColor #4CAF50
skinparam classMethodIconFontColor #FFFFFF
skinparam classMethodIconFontStyle bold
skinparam classMethodIconFontSize 10
skinparam classMethodIconPadding 2
skinparam classMethodIconMargin 2
skinparam classMethodIconAlignment center
skinparam classMethodIconVerticalAlignment middle
skinparam classMethodIconHorizontalAlignment center
skinparam classMethodIconVerticalAlignment middle
skinparam classMethodIconHorizontalAlignment center
skinparam classMethodIconVerticalAlignment middle
skinparam classMethodIconHorizontalAlignment center
skinparam classMethodIconVerticalAlignment middle
skinparam classMethodIconHorizontalAlignment center
skinparam classMethodIconVerticalAlignment middle
skinparam classMethodIconHorizontalAlignment center
skinparam classMethodIconVerticalAlignment middle
skinparam classMethodIconHorizontalAlignment center
skinparam classMethodIconVerticalAlignment middle
skinparam classMethodIconHorizontalAlignment center
skinparam classMethodIconVerticalAlignment middle
skinparam classMethodIconHorizontalAlignment center
skinparam classMethod......
class ProductSupSku {
    + id : Integer
    + supplierId:Integer 供应商id
    + skuId:Integer
    + skuPrice:BigDecimal sku价格
    + supplierSupRatio:Double 供货比例
    + skuSupRatio:Double 供应商sku供货比例
    + auditStatus:String 审核状态
    + createTime:Long 创建时间
    + updateTime:Long 修改时间
    + creator:Integer 创建人
    + reviser:Integer 修改人
    + dataStatus:String 数据状态
}
class ProductSupSkuService {
    + insertProductSku(ProductSupSku psk)
    + updateProductSku(ProductSupSku psk)
    + selectProductSkuGroupBySkuId()
    + selectByProductAndSku(Integer productId,Integer skuId)
}
ProductSupSkuService --> ProductSupSku
@enduml
